context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the image_asset theme-asset fallback pattern in Horizon's shared `image` block (blocks/image.liquid) when Shopify Files library access is unavailable. The pattern requires three specific changes: adding a text setting to the block schema, adding a Liquid branch that renders the asset_url when the picked image is blank, and using the image_asset key in template JSON instead of a shopify://shop_images/ URL. Horizon image blocks reference settings via block.settings (aliased here as block_settings).

checklist.name: image_asset text setting in schema
checklist.description: The updated blocks/image.liquid adds a text setting with id "image_asset" to the block schema settings array

checklist.name: Setting label present
checklist.description: The image_asset setting has a label field (e.g. 'Theme asset filename (fallback)')

checklist.name: Setting info field present
checklist.description: The image_asset setting has an info field explaining its use (e.g. 'Used when no image is picked')

checklist.name: Liquid branch for blank picker
checklist.description: The Liquid code adds a branch that renders the theme asset when the picked image is blank but image_asset is set (e.g. an `elsif block_settings.image_asset != blank` branch added to the existing if/else that builds the image markup)

checklist.name: asset_url filter used
checklist.description: The fallback branch renders the image using the asset_url filter (e.g. block_settings.image_asset | asset_url)

checklist.name: Fallback image styled to fill
checklist.description: The fallback img tag is styled to fill its container — either by reusing the block's existing image class (image-block__image, which already applies object-fit: cover) or via inline style properties (width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover or equivalent)

checklist.name: Template uses image_asset key
checklist.description: templates/index.json uses the "image_asset" key with a filename value (e.g. "image_asset": "hero.png") on an image block

checklist.name: No shopify://shop_images/ for the fallback block
checklist.description: templates/index.json does NOT use a "image": "shopify://shop_images/..." value for the image block being demonstrated (it relies on image_asset instead)

checklist.name: Original image picker preserved
checklist.description: The image_picker setting (id "image") and its normal rendering path are still present in the updated block (not removed)
